items.caption: An interior space, likely a mail room or parcel room, with a modern design. the room features a combination of dark and light gray tones, with a large, metallic locker system on the right side. on the left, there is a wall with a graphic of a city skyline and an airplane, suggesting a theme of travel or urban living. the text "you've got mail" is prominently displayed in a bold, sans-serif font, reinforcing the theme of mail delivery. the room is well-lit, with a focus on the locker system, and there is a small, illuminated sign above the locker area. the overall impression is of a contemporary, functional space designed for the storage and retrieval of mail and packages.
Close-up of numbered lockers in a locker room, showcasing a minimalist design.
items.creator: Ivan S

items.caption: A clean and organized locker room with numbered lockers and a wooden bench.
